title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
